messages.author: magnus919
messages.text: I’m interested in partnering with a handful of people who are serious about blanketing Raleigh, NC with well-placed MeshCore repeaters and putting in work with me to drive up coverage & adoption while maintaining a positive community image. See Austin Mesh for inspiration. If you use private channels for political or tacticool purposes, that’s fine. Just keep it separate from this project. Aiming for just being good infrastructure for various subcommunities to use.
messages.content_html: I’m interested in partnering with a handful of people who are serious about blanketing Raleigh, NC with well-placed MeshCore repeaters and putting in work with me to drive up coverage & adoption while maintaining a positive community image. Aiming for just being good infrastructure for various subcommunities to use.

messages.author: magnus919
messages.content_html: New repeater hardware coming

messages.author: errant_syscall
messages.text: Got a t-beam up in east Raleigh, will add altitude. Putting up another node in downtown Durham sometime in the near future alongside my meshtastic node at work.
